summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.76 % today, the main contract closed at 828. The steel millsare active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 920-930 yuan/mt.
